summary: Sidebar Accordion Reorganization - All tests passed. Verified 6 accordion groups (Dashboard, Commerciale, Produzione, Certificazioni, Acquisti & Magazzino, Perizie) with collapsible children, plus Impostazioni link at bottom. Auto-open on navigation, chevron animation, multiple groups open simultaneously, and user menu all work correctly.

All data-testid attributes working correctly.
